title: Wipe EDHOC ephemeral private keys on successful handshake paths
description: Trigger: successful EDHOC initiator or responder handshake. lichen/subsys/lichen/edhoc/edhoc.c sets state to completed/sent at lines 710 and 997 after deriving the shared secret, but ctx->eph_sk remains in the long-lived context. Impact: ephemeral X25519 private keys remain resident after they are no longer needed, increasing exposure if memory is later disclosed. Wipe ctx->eph_sk once G_XY and the required PRKs have been derived, while preserving any material needed for OSCORE export.
close_reason: Implemented fixes in assigned subagents and ran available focused checks; full Zephyr builds remain blocked by existing workspace/module setup issues.
